title: Momonosuke Gives the Order
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on momonosuke gives the order within the The Elephant Speaks storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The beast is coming down! Eat that!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: I think your voice will reach it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We'll end up on the ocean floor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But how in the world am I supposed to speak loud enough...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter! Just scream your lungs out! You is gonna die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Do not give up, zoo! You must not fall!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: Drive out Jack! Push him back!

summary: Momonosuke Gives the Order: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
